title: Tooltip
description: A small popup that appears when an element receives hover or focus.

manual.title: Install dependencies
manual.description: Install the required dependencies for the tooltip component.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

usage.import: import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider, TooltipTrigger } from '@repo/components';

examples.title: Basic
Placements
examples.description: Tooltips can be placed on different sides of the trigger using the side prop.

examples.title: Rich Content
examples.description: You can add rich content like icons and keyboard shortcuts inside a tooltip.

examples.title: Disabled State
examples.description: To display a tooltip on a disabled button, wrap the button in a focusable element like a span.
